description: Stores documented workflow SOPs generated by the Workflow Documenter plugin

Description.description: Brief summary of the workflow purpose

Steps Count.description: Total number of steps in the workflow

Tools Used.description: Tools and systems involved in the workflow

Handoff Points.description: Number of person-to-person or system-to-system handoffs

Complexity.description: Assessed complexity tier of the workflow

SOP File Path.description: Local file path where the SOP markdown was saved

Diagram Included.description: Whether a Mermaid flowchart diagram was generated

Generated At.description: Timestamp when the SOP was generated

Last Updated.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to this SOP

idempotent_key.notes: Match by Title + same calendar day to prevent duplicates on re-runs
